raw_consumer_statement: My Best Buy account was compromised on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX received an email stating that changes were made to my account and a purchase was made the and shipped XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Tx XXXX I have documentation from Best Buy proving this as a result several investigations from Best Buys the order and delivery tracking information was provided to me from the Best Buy, I will include them with this complaint. I did not have access because to my account, all login information and address were changed. I immediately closed the account. After two-years of letters and phone conversation Citibank and Best Buy refuse to resolve this issue. My XXXX XXXX went from excellent to fair, I refuse to pay for something that I never received, and Citibank and Best Buy have sent me proof of fraudulent activity with this issue, all will be included with this complaint. I would like this removed from my credit report immediately and {$220.00} refunded I paid. XXXX purchases were made and delivered the same address XXXX XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, Best Buy removed XXXX and the other remained. I will include my driver license and address where I lived for the last XXXX  years.
